final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character illustration of a 汉服 woman playing guqin in a bamboo forest under moonlight (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 古风 / 神秘东方 aesthetic suited for game character art (立绘) — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a vertical portrait framing befitting a game 立绘 — exact framing and angle are yours
Subject: must include a 汉服 woman (one), seated and playing guqin, with flowing robes (衣袂飘飘), exuding an ethereal 仙气 presence
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest at night with moonlight filtering through bamboo leaves casting dappled shadows
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious, moonlit atmosphere with 斑驳 light-and-shadow interplay through bamboo leaves — exact light source treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking cool moonlight and deep night with subtle warm accents — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs delicate fabric and silk texture on the 汉服, and natural bamboo texture in the backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
